trim_threads_with_snips.query: a worker uses blue-handled scissors to cut loose threads from a white garment on the table
trim_threads_with_snips.prompt:
Event: a worker uses blue-handled scissors to cut loose threads from a white garment on the table
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

spread_white_garment_on_table.prompt:
Event: a worker unfolds and spreads a white garment flat on the work table
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
